title: tragacantha corrugata
intro: Tragacantha corrugata, also known as the prickly thistle or corrugated milk thistle, is a species of thistle that is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to protect the liver and promote digestion. The leaves and flowers of Tragacantha corrugata have been used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues, including liver and gallbladder problems, and are also believed to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. Tragacantha corrugata can be prepared as a herbal tea, capsule, or infusion, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
